items.name_en: 【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
items.name_cn:
【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
A highly stylized soft silhouette with sharp, strong edges fused with a box shape. The classic monogram pattern creates a unique look in the crowded bag market. It looks amazing worn and holds up well in any scene, offering a street-style vibe with a large capacity.
Size: 18*12.5*8cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
【ALMA BB Bag】M13078 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Alma BB St bag exudes the joyful style of the collaboration series, cleverly revisiting the 1930s Art Deco design. The Monogram coated canvas renders the whimsical tones of Takashi Murakami, while the Toron handle, base, detachable shoulder strap, and key pouch incorporate classic calfskin elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm

items.name_cn:
【Authentic Chip Version】M46653
This OnTheGo tote blends Giant Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, reinterpreting the spacious East West silhouette. A removable round coin pouch adds detail, while the Toron top handle and removable wide strap offer versatile carrying options. 25.0 x 13.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: 【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
items.name_cn:
【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
The be alma handbag blends the brand's iconic Alma handbag and makeup pouch designs, playing with urban travel style in the 2025 Cruise early spring collection. The compact structure features a woven chain strap, serving as a clutch or worn crossbody with a long shoulder strap.
Size: 15 x 7 x 27 cm

specs.rawTitle:

Size: 15 x 7 x 27 cm

items.name_cn:
【Boulogne Handbag Vintage】m51265 Monogram
Part of the vintage Boulogne handbag series. Crafted from classic Monogram canvas, it features an adjustable shoulder strap for crossbody or shoulder wear, and a large capacity pocket to hold daily essentials. Unisex and timeless.
Dimensions: 19.0×30.0×10.0cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
【Camera Box Handbag】 m82465
This Camera Box handbag features a modern structure crafted from Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, blending signature details of the Petite Malle such as the S-lock closure, metal corners, and studs. A slender chain adds a feminine touch, while the top handle offers another comfortable carrying option.
Size: 12.5 x 17.6 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 【CarryAll Handbag】 m13661 White Multi (Three Colors - Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【CarryAll Handbag】 m13661 White Multi (Three Colors - Murakami)
The CarryAll HlJH small handbag features Monogram Hl LT canvas and leather trim, creating a perfect companion for urban life. The spacious design includes a neat interior with a large inner pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap.
Size: 29 x 24 x 12 cm
